scenarios.description: load() returns Dotenv and merges file entries when systemProperties=false and .env has entries (branch-false, loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: directory contains .env with multiple key-value lines
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv without setting any System properties; dotenv.get returns file values
pseudocode: TEST TC09 load merges file when systemProperties=false

scenarios.description: load() returns Dotenv without exception when .env is missing and ignoreIfMissing() called (branch-false, no-file)
scenarios.precondition: empty directory with no .env file; ignoreIfMissing enabled
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv; entries() size equals system env size; entries(filter) empty
pseudocode: TEST TC10 load ignores missing file with ignoreIfMissing
Path dir = temp directory with no .env;

scenarios.description: load() returns Dotenv when .env malformed and ignoreIfMalformed() called (branch-false, malformed-file)
scenarios.precondition: directory contains .env with malformed line; ignoreIfMalformed enabled
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv; no exception; entries(filter) empty or only valid lines if any
pseudocode: TEST TC11 load ignores malformed entries with ignoreIfMalformed
